verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Enter His gates with thanksgiving Come into His courts with praise, Enter His presence rejoicing Singing great and mighty is His name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Praise Him with the sound of trumpet Praise Him with the timbrel and harp Let every creature in heaven and earth Lift a sound of praise Sing with all their heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For the Lord is good (For the Lord is good) For the Lord is good (For the Lord is good) For the Lord is good And His mercy endures forever

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For the Lord is good And His mercy endures forever

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus, the Son is exalted Maker of everything Come now and bow down before Him Lift your hands in praise Raise your voice to sing

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: For the Lord is good (For the Lord is good) For the Lord is good (For the Lord is good) For the Lord is good And His mercy endures forever

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: For the Lord is good And His mercy endures forever
